title: Inception
description: A mind-bending thriller about dreams within dreams.
detailedDescription: A skilled thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given a chance to erase his past crimes by planting an idea into a target's subconscious.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman faces his greatest enemy, the Joker.
detailedDescription: Batman sets out to dismantle organized crime in Gotham but faces chaos brought by the Joker, testing his moral limits.

title: Interstellar
description: A journey through space and time to save humanity.
detailedDescription: A group of astronauts travel through a wormhole in search of a new home for humanity as Earth becomes uninhabitable.

title: Titanic
description: A tragic love story on the ill-fated ship.
detailedDescription: A young couple from different social classes fall in love aboard the Titanic, which later sinks in a historic disaster.

title: Avatar
description: A visually stunning sci-fi adventure.
detailedDescription: A paraplegic Marine is sent to Pandora and becomes part of a conflict between humans and the native Na’vi people.

title: The Avengers
description: Earth's mightiest heroes unite.
detailedDescription: Iron Man, Captain America, Thor, and Hulk team up to stop Loki and save Earth from invasion.

title: Frozen
description: A magical story of sisterhood and love.
detailedDescription: A princess sets out to find her estranged sister whose icy powers have trapped their kingdom in eternal winter.

title: Joker
description: The origin story of Gotham’s villain.
detailedDescription: A mentally troubled comedian descends into madness and becomes the infamous Joker.

title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
description: Multiverse chaos unleashed.
detailedDescription: Spider-Man seeks help from Doctor Strange, but things go wrong, opening the multiverse.

title: Black Panther
description: A king rises to protect Wakanda.
detailedDescription: T’Challa returns home to Wakanda to take his rightful place as king and protect his nation.

title: The Lion King
description: A young lion’s journey to become king.
detailedDescription: Simba must embrace his destiny after the death of his father.

title: Avengers: Endgame
description: The epic conclusion of the Avengers saga.
detailedDescription: The Avengers assemble once more to undo Thanos’ actions and restore balance.

title: Doctor Strange
description: A surgeon becomes a master of mystic arts.
detailedDescription: After an accident, a brilliant surgeon learns the secrets of the mystic arts.

title: Deadpool
description: A sarcastic anti-hero seeks revenge.
detailedDescription: A former soldier turned mercenary gains powers and hunts down the man who ruined his life.

title: Fast & Furious 7
description: High-speed action and family bonds.
detailedDescription: Dom and his crew face a deadly assassin seeking revenge.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
description: A boy discovers he is a wizard.
detailedDescription: Harry Potter enters Hogwarts and begins his magical journey.

title: The Matrix
description: Reality is not what it seems.
detailedDescription: A hacker discovers the truth about reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

title: Gladiator
description: A Roman general seeks revenge.
detailedDescription: A betrayed general becomes a gladiator and seeks justice.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
description: Hope can set you free.
detailedDescription: Two imprisoned men bond over years, finding redemption through hope.

title: Forrest Gump
description: Life is like a box of chocolates.
detailedDescription: The life journey of Forrest Gump, a simple man witnessing historical events.
